mapper.sql: select o.id, o.yd_no, o.leader, o.plate_number, o.task_time, o.create_time, o.instruction, o.team, o.vehicles, o.schedule, o.car_type, o.welling_point, c.lname as welling_point_name, o.mineral_type, o.miners, o.discharge, o.release_date, o.release_confirmation, o.weighing_time, o.total_tonnage, o.unloading_point, o.unloading_types, o.unload_user, o.unloading_time, o.number_vehicles, o.unloading_confirmation, o.progress from yn_logs_out o left join a_camera c on c.id = o.welling_point
mapper.insert: insert into yn_logs_out(yd_no, leader, plate_number, task_time, create_time, instruction, team, vehicles, schedule, car_type, welling_point, mineral_type, miners, discharge, release_date, release_confirmation, weighing_time, total_tonnage, unloading_point, unloading_types, unload_user, unloading_time, number_vehicles, unloading_confirmation, progress) values(#{ydNo}, #{leader}, #{plateNumber}, #{taskTime}, sysdate(), #{instruction}, #{team}, #{vehicles}, #{schedule}, #{carType}, #{wellingPoint}, #{mineralType}, #{miners}, #{discharge}, #{releaseDate}, #{releaseConfirmation}, #{weighingTime}, #{totalTonnage}, #{unloadingPoint}, #{unloadingTypes}, #{unloadUser}, #{unloadingTime}, #{numberVehicles}, #{unloadingConfirmation}, #{progress})
mapper.delete:
delete from yn_logs_out where id in
#{id}
